PostToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/pyright "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep -q '0 errors' && true || echo 'PYRIGHT: type errors detected'; true

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'osmose/engine/.*\.py$' && cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -x -q -k "$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .py)" 2>&1 | tail -5; true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'osmose/schema/.*\.py$' && echo 'REMINDER: Schema changed — verify tests cover new/modified fields'; true

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'ui/.*\.py$' && cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && grep -n 'sync_inputs()\|update_config()' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -v 'isolate' | grep -v 'def ' | head -5 | while read line; do echo "WARNING: Possible missing reactive.isolate() — $line"; done; true

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'ui/pages/.*\.py$' && grep -q 'import ui.charts' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && echo 'ERROR: ui.charts must only be imported in app.py (shadows shiny.ui) — revert this change immediately'; true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'tests/test_.*\.py$' && cd /home/razinka/osmose/osmose-python && .venv/bin/python -m pytest "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; true

echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'osmose/engine/processes/(movement|mortality|predation)\.py$' && grep -qE '@njit|@jit' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && echo 'REMINDER: Numba-jitted function changed — first run will include recompilation overhead, do not compare timing until second run'; true

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|lock)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env or lock files directly' && exit 1; true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'osmose-java/' && echo 'BLOCKED: Java engine files are read-only reference code — do not edit' && exit 1; true
